category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Kazakhstan) compliance comparison across EAEU and Chinese baseline requirements.

title.en: China-to-Kazakhstan Lithium Battery and Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入哈萨克斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入哈薩克：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Source-linked, informational comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Kazakhstan (EAEU / EAC) requirements: safety under TR CU, EMC, mandatory EAC marking, hazardous-substance controls, importer responsibility, and UN 38.3 transport.
description.zh: 来源链接、公益性对比：中国锂电池/移动电源与哈萨克斯坦（EAEU / EAC）要求：TR CU安全、EMC、EAC强制标志、禁限用有害物、进口商责任及UN 38.3运输要求。
description.zht: 來源連結、公益性對比：中國鋰電池/行動電源與哈薩克斯坦（EAEU / EAC）要求：TR CU安全、EMC、EAC強制標誌、禁限用有害物、進口商責任及UN 38.3運輸要求。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Confirm requirements with competent authorities and in-country advisors before market entry. This page does not constitute certification, legal opinion, customs clearance, or market-access authorization.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。进出口前请向主管机关和合格的本地法律技术顾问核实全部要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关放行或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。進出口前請向主管機關及合資格本地法律技術顧問核實全部要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關放行或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Kazakhstan is in the EAEU, so China-exported lithium batteries and power banks commonly need EAC-based conformity, TR CU safety and EMC compliance, TR EAEU 037/2016 hazardous-substance evidence, and local in-country importer handling; Chinese GB 31241 and CCC do not automatically satisfy Kazakhstan market-entry routes.
answer_first.zh: 哈萨克斯坦是EAEU成员，通常要求中国出口锂电池和移动电源走EAC合规路径，满足TR CU的安全与EMC要求、TR EAEU 037/2016有害物质规定，并由本国进口商配合，单一中国GB 31241或CCC证明并不能直接满足哈萨克斯坦市场准入。
answer_first.zht: 哈薩克斯坦為EAEU成員國，通常要求中國出口鋰電池及行動電源走EAC合規路徑，滿足TR CU的安全與EMC要求、TR EAEU 037/2016有害物質規定，並需本國進口商配合，單一中國GB 31241或CCC證明不能直接滿足哈薩克斯坦市場准入。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Update when regulator pages or technical-reference mappings change; keep citations and status flags current before setting human_reviewed true.
